name: ElementBase
summary: The ElementBase class is the abstract base class for all mark elements.

methods.name: Clone
methods.summary: Creates a new object that is a copy of the current instance.

returns.doc: A new object that is a copy of the current instance.

methods.name: GetUnformattedString
methods.summary: Returns the content as a string without formatting.

returns.doc: The content as a string without formatting.

methods.name: IsEqual
methods.summary: Compares the current object with the given object. Checks every field of both objects for equality.

params.name: ObjectToCompare
params.doc: An object of the same type to be used for comparing.

returns.doc: True if the field values of both objects match.
